data.body: STACK COMMIT 8 (#3 rollout/calibration raptorial-galloping-dragon): 82444dd. ALL 8 CHILDREN COMMITTED. IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION const (plan-v2/code-v2) top-level in both REVIEW_RESULT sidecars; calibrate_plan_review_thresholds.py --impact-model-version version-segmented replay (missing-tag=skip); ab_impact_model.py ABSOLUTE regression-detecting gate (median(HIGH)-median(NIT)>0.30 AND median(NIT)<0.30 strict, per ADR0035; degenerate scorer fails; NOT trivially-passable beat-old-mean); permissive invariant test (code-review blocking_enabled=={secret-detection,high-critical-security} DET; plan-review default_posture==blocking pinned to #5-approved 11 set COH/E2/E4/F1/G1G2/G5/G6/T1/T4/T5e/T8); ADR0036 cadence. test_impact_model_versioning.py(8). Plan-review 5 rounds (deep catches: A/B baseline unscoreable->absolute gate; plan-review blocking_enabled vacuous->default_posture predicate). PASS+signed verified_at_sha=cb4609b(tip). lint+mypy clean, 8 tests+488 sidecar regression green. STACK: a23963ca3#4 29d9fa863#1 068ba1842#2 23581b171#5 e9a36e568#6 66956c0#7 cb4609b#8 82444dd#3. NEXT: full CI preflight on 8-stack, push gerrit refs/for/main (flat stack), LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 per change, close children bottom-first after Verified, close epic, submit.
